name: zhihu-api
description: Local reusable Zhihu browser-backed API for challenge-aware fetching and parsing.

scripts.check: node --check src/server.mjs && node --check src/cli.mjs && node --check src/fetcher.mjs && node --check src/request-options.mjs && node --check src/parsers/common.mjs && node --check src/parsers/index.mjs && node --check src/parsers/column-article.mjs && node --check src/parsers/question.mjs && node --check src/parsers/answer.mjs && node --check src/parsers/profile.mjs && node --check scripts/smoke.mjs
